channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: AAVE eyes a breakout to 130 as buyers clamp above 113. Bulls must hold the line to keep the run alive. 🚀📈 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260417-prediction-aave-targets-130-as-technical-breakout-confirms #AAVE #DeFi #CryptoNews
